title: BEM-661 dispatch queue safe
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
wf=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
queue=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue'); queue.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
results_dir=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results'); results_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore')
text=text.replace('  actions: read', '  actions: write')
if 'name: Dispatch workflow queue' not in text:
    marker='      - name: Write result files'
    step='''      - name: Dispatch workflow queue
        if: env.TASK_FOUND == 'true'
        shell: bash
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT || github.token }}
          GH_REPOSITORY: ${{ github.repository }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p governance/workflow_dispatch_results
          if [ ! -d governance/workflow_dispatch_queue ]; then
            echo "No workflow dispatch queue"
            exit 0
          fi
          shopt -s nullglob
          for f in governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/*.json; do
            WORKFLOW=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(open(sys.argv[1])).get('workflow',''))" "$f")
            REF=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(open(sys.argv[1])).get('ref','main'))" "$f")
            if [ -z "$WORKFLOW" ]; then
              echo "missing_workflow" > "governance/workflow_dispatch_results/$(basename "$f" .json).status"
              continue
            fi
            BODY=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print(json.dumps({'ref':data.get('ref','main'),'inputs':data.get('inputs',{})}))" "$f")
            HTTP_CODE=$(curl -sS -o "governance/workflow_dispatch_results/$(basename "$f" .json).response.json" -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "https://api.github.com/repos/${GH_REPOSITORY}/actions/workflows/${WORKFLOW}/dispatches" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${GH_TOKEN}" -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" -H "X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28" -d "$BODY" || echo "000")
            echo "$HTTP_CODE" > "governance/workflow_dispatch_results/$(basename "$f" .json).status"
            echo "Dispatched ${WORKFLOW}: ${HTTP_CODE}"
          done
          git add governance/workflow_dispatch_results governance/workflow_dispatch_queue 2>/dev/null || true
          if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then
            git commit -m "CODEX-RUNNER: workflow dispatch queue trace=${{ inputs.trace_id }}" || true
            git push || true
          fi

'''
    if marker in text:
        text=text.replace(marker, step+marker, 1)
wf.write_text(text)

protocol=protocols/'WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_QUEUE.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-661 | Workflow Dispatch Queue'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:55 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Purpose'+sep+'Commits created by GitHub Actions may not reliably trigger other workflows by push. `codex-runner.yml` now has `actions: write` and dispatches workflow queue items from `governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/*.json` via GitHub Actions API.'+sep+sep+'## Queue item'+sep+'```json'+sep+'{"workflow":"telegram-send-smoke.yml","ref":"main","inputs":{}}'+sep+'```'+sep)

final=wf.read_text(errors='ignore')
checks=[
 {'name':'codex_runner_exists','pass':wf.exists(),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'actions_write_present','pass':'  actions: write' in final,'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'actions_read_absent','pass':'  actions: read' not in final,'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'dispatch_step_present','pass':'name: Dispatch workflow queue' in final,'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'queue_dir_exists','pass':queue.exists(),'evidence':str(queue)},
 {'name':'results_dir_exists','pass':results_dir.exists(),'evidence':str(results_dir)}
]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='pass' if not failed else 'failed'
blocker=None if status=='pass' else {'code':'WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_QUEUE_PATCH_FAILED','failed':failed}
state={'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_patch.v1','bem':'BEM-661','status':status,'checks':checks,'workflow':str(wf),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:55 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem661_codex_runner_dispatch_queue_safe.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem661_codex_runner_dispatch_queue_safe.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-661 | Codex Runner Dispatch Queue Safe | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:55 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL') for x in checks])+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem661_codex_runner_dispatch_queue_safe','cycle_id':'bem661-codex-runner-dispatch-queue-safe','source':'executor','status':status,'workflow':str(wf),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:55 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem661_codex_runner_dispatch_queue_safe']={'status':status,'workflow':str(wf),'state_file':str(state_file),'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['workflow_dispatch_queue_status']='enabled' if status=='pass' else 'failed'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 15:55 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem661_codex_runner_dispatch_queue_safe.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-661 '+status.upper()+': codex-runner workflow dispatch queue enabled.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(wf),str(protocol),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Enabled codex-runner workflow dispatch queue with actions write to trigger workflows explicitly instead of relying on push recursion')
"""
No issue comments.
